message: Hello B1. To maximize our payoffs over 20 rounds, let's agree on a price of 60. I'll ask 60, you bid 60. Sound good?
Agreed: 60 each round. I’ll bid 60; please ask 60. If you keep it, I’ll keep it.
Stick to 60 each round; I’ll bid 60 while you ask 60. Deviate and I drop to 50 thereafter. As a sweetener, if we keep 60 through round 19, I’ll bid 61 in round 20.
Agreed, B1. I'll ask 60 every round to keep our steady trades at 60. Looking forward to the bonus in round 20!
